# ADR-007 Compliance — Security Architecture

**Governance phase:** 3.5 · **Authority document:** `docs/ADR-007-*.md` · **Date:** 2026-07-19
**Verifier:** `architecture/compliance/verify-architecture.mjs` · **Do not edit the ADR itself.**

## Purpose
Protect the platform: authentication, authorization, token lifecycle, OTP, rate limiting, IDOR prevention, PII posture.

## Scope
Enterprise security architecture — identity, access, secrets, data protection. No protocol prescription.

## Current implementation status
**Proposed; Strong baseline implemented — 70% compliant.**

## Implemented components
- JWT + refresh rotation + revocation store (alg:none forgery disproven live)
- RBAC (authenticateAdmin) on all admin/approval routes
- OTP gate (replay disproven live)
- IDOR prevented via JWT-only identity (balance:idor 403)
- Rate limiting with per-phone lock persisted

## Remaining work
- PII masking in rate-limiter logs (H-1)
- XFF trust-proxy hardening (H-2)
- Socket re-authentication on token revocation (H-3)
- Secrets management via compose secrets platform-wide

## Evidence
- identity A/B: rotation+replay-401
- live: forged alg:none→null, OTP replay→false
- Users A/B balance:idor 403
- P6-06 suspend revokes access+refresh+socket

## Related source code
- `src/middleware/auth.js`
- `src/infrastructure/gateways/tokenGatewayAdapter.js`
- `src/domain/users/userPolicies.js`
- `src/services/otpService.js`

## Related tests
- `tests/unit/identity.test.js`
- `tests/integration/identity-ab.mjs`

## Compliance percentage
**70%** — honest estimate: weight of ADR requirements realized under the ADR-005
layered architecture with evidence, vs. total requirements named in the ADR.

## Risks
- H-1 raw phone in rate-limiter logs (privacy)
- H-2 XFF spoofable rate-limit bypass
- Socket auth only at handshake

## Required actions
- Apply maskPhone in rateLimiter
- Set trust proxy + use req.ip
- Periodic socket re-auth / disconnect on revoke
